title: Automation First
guidance: Delivery processes should be scripted reproducible and observable rather than manual and tribal
do: Automate repeatable release and environment checks
dont: Do not rely on undocumented manual deployment steps

title: Secure the Pipeline
guidance: CI and release automation must protect secrets and include security scanning where relevant
do: Use secret stores least privilege and automated checks
dont: Do not commit credentials or bypass security controls in the pipeline

title: Prefer Zero-Downtime Release Patterns
guidance: Release plans should include health checks rollback and low-risk rollout patterns
do: Use canary rolling or blue-green techniques when appropriate
dont: Do not treat rollback and health validation as optional
